chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P^0.D-399 0{2023 Date Order with signature of Judge For ordan on offles oblactlont For haarlng of maln cودد 12092023 Mr Abdul Naeem Pirzada Advocate for the Petitioner Mr Khuda Chohan Advocate for Respondents No 4 to 6 Mr Mehboob Ali Wassan, AAG +11+++++++++++ Petitioner who W35 Sweeper/ Worker (BPS-02) in Sukkur Municipal Corporation (since retired) has filed this petition for recalculation of gratuity leave encashment (LPR) and monthly pension Learned Counsel for the Respondents has filed statement stating that all the dues have been reimbursed to the petitioner and he is getting regular monthly pensioni however, if petitioner files fresh application for recalculation of his pensionary benefits the same shall be decided in accordance with law Petition is accordingly disposed of Bux Sanitary sala٢y
